text:
Athens Times

—

The men’s national pole was defeated in an incredible way by Serbia in the final seconds of the quarterfinal and stayed out of medal zone. The obligations of blue-white are not completed in Paris, as it will compete in ranking games for positions 5-8. There he will meet Australia, which was defeated by the U.S. in the penalty. As for semi-final couples, these are Serbia – USA and Croatia – Hungary.

Athens Times

News about Greece and the World.
title: The men's national pole against Australia for positions 5-8 at the Olympics - Athens Times
author: uploader
